issues.description: Action uses SearchDeck but should use a sequence: look at 3 cards (peek/reveal), filter for Revolutionary Army type (excluding Captains Assembled), add up to 1 to hand, then trash the rest. Current DSL does not capture the 'look at 3' constraint, the exclusion filter, the 'up to 1' limit, or the trash action.
Filter is 'Any' but should restrict to {Revolutionary Army} type cards, excluding [Captains Assembled] by name.
Missing trash action for cards not added to hand. Effect requires two distinct outcomes: add 1 card to hand and trash the remaining viewed cards.
